texto: I speak as a planetary physician whose patient, the living Earth, complains of fever; I see the Earth's declining health as our most important concern, our very lives depending upon a healthy Earth. Our concern for it must come first, because the welfare of the burgeoning mass of humanity demands a healthy planet.
explicacao: Orientação direta de James E. Lovelock sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I speak as a planetary physician whose patient, the living Earth, complains of fever; I see the E…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, earth, reflexao, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao.

frase_original: I speak as a planetary physician whose patient, the living Earth, complains of fever; I see the Earth's declining health as our most important concern, our very lives depending upon a healthy Earth. Our concern for it must come first, because the welfare of the burgeoning mass of humanity demands a healthy planet.

texto: We are the intelligent elite among animal life on earth and whatever our mistakes, [Earth] needs us. This may seem an odd statement after all that I have said about the way 20th century humans became almost a planetary disease organism. But it has taken [Earth] 2.5 billion years to evolve an animal that can think and communicate its thoughts. If we become extinct she has little chance of evolving another.
explicacao: Citação de James E.
